meta.legal_notice: Legal documents are authoritative in English. Translations are provided for convenience only.

cookie.title: Cookie consent
cookie.text: We use cookies and local storage to improve your experience. Essential cookies are required for the site to function. Optional cookies help with analytics and remembering your preferences.

home.hero_headline: The ecosystem platform for sports technology in Africa
home.hero_subheadline: Connecting African and International innovation markets. Regulatory intelligence, market insight, and industry membership.
home.what_we_do_heading: Three ways we serve the African sports tech ecosystem
home.card1_body: Connecting international sports tech companies with African markets - introductions, partnerships, and distribution across South Africa and the broader continent.
home.card2_body: Acting as your registered POPIA representative in South Africa - handling regulatory correspondence, maintaining compliance documentation, and keeping you informed of changes.
home.card3_body: African sports tech market research, company directories, and sector analysis for members, partners, and investors navigating the continent.
home.services_card1_body: If your company collects or processes data from South African users, POPIA requires a local representative. AfricanSTN provides registered representation - enquire for details on what is covered.
home.services_card2_body: Register to receive AfricanSTN's newsletter and sector intelligence reports. Register your interest in directory inclusion - AfricanSTN curates the directory and will be in touch.
home.cta_heading: Join the African sports technology ecosystem
home.cta_body: Whether you are an international sports tech company entering Africa, an African venture looking for visibility, or an organisation that needs POPIA compliance support - AfricanSTN is your starting point.

about.hero_subheading: The ecosystem platform for sports technology in Africa - connecting international innovation with African markets, supporting African ventures, and providing the compliance and intelligence infrastructure the sector needs.
about.purpose_heading: Building the African sports tech ecosystem
about.para1: African Sports Technology Network (AfricanSTN) is the ecosystem platform for sports technology in Africa.
about.para2: The platform connects international sports tech companies with African markets, supports emerging African sports tech ventures, and provides compliance, distribution, and market intelligence services.
about.para3: AfricanSTN is a South African-registered entity, operating as the subsidiary of Sports Tech Africa Limited (STZA), a UK-incorporated holding company.
about.feature1_body: Linking international sports tech companies with African market opportunities, partners, and distribution channels.
about.feature2_body: Acting as registered POPIA representative for foreign companies operating in South Africa.
about.feature3_body: Publishing market intelligence, research, and the African sports tech company directory.
about.value1_body: Content is researched, specific, and grounded in data. The African sports tech landscape is complex - and that complexity deserves accurate, substantiated coverage.
about.value2_body: Positioned at the intersection of international sports tech and African markets. The value is in introductions, facilitation, and bridging - not gatekeeping.
about.value3_body: Operating to international standards across compliance, documentation, and communications - reflecting the quality of work expected by international partners.
about.value4_body: Complex topics - POPIA, cross-border data, market entry - are explained plainly. Expertise should open doors, not create barriers.
about.value5_body: South Africa is the operational base, but the lens is continental. AfricanSTN represents the breadth of African sports technology, not a single market.
about.value6_body: Ambitious about what the African sports tech ecosystem can become - and honest about where things stand today. Substance over hype, always.
about.cta_heading: Be part of the African sports technology ecosystem
about.cta_body: For compliance support, market intelligence, or a partner to help navigate Africa - AfricanSTN is a good starting point.

services.hero_subheading: Compliance representation and market intelligence for sports tech companies operating in or entering South Africa.
services.intel_para1: AfricanSTN is building a directory of sports technology companies operating across Africa, alongside sector research and market analysis.
services.intel_para2: Registered members receive AfricanSTN's newsletter and sector intelligence reports covering African sports tech developments, funding activity, and market trends. Directory inclusion is curated - companies can register their interest and AfricanSTN will confirm inclusion.
services.intel_card1_body: Sports tech companies across Africa, organised by sector, country, and stage. Directory inclusion is curated - register your interest to be considered.
services.intel_card2_body: Analysis of the African sports tech landscape, funding trends, and market developments.
services.intel_card3_body: Country-level analysis beginning with South Africa, expanding across the continent as the platform grows.
services.intel_card4_body: Investment rounds, M&A activity, and partnership developments across the African sports tech ecosystem.
services.popia_para1: The Protection of Personal Information Act (POPIA) is South Africa's primary data protection legislation. If your company collects, processes, or stores data from South African individuals, POPIA requires you to appoint a local representative in South Africa.
services.popia_para2: AfricanSTN provides that representation - handling regulatory correspondence with the Information Regulator of South Africa, maintaining compliance documentation, and keeping you informed of regulatory developments that affect your operations.
services.popia_notice: POPIA Reg. 2026-002350 · African Sports Technology Network (Pty) Ltd is POPIA compliant and registered with the Information Regulator of South Africa.
services.feature1_body: Registered as your appointed local representative with the Information Regulator of South Africa.
services.feature2_body: All communication with the Information Regulator handled, with notification of any enquiries or developments affecting your registration.
services.feature3_body: Maintenance of the compliance records and documentation required under POPIA.
services.feature4_body: Tracking changes to POPIA guidance and regulation, with notification of anything that affects your South African data operations.
services.cta_heading: Interested in any of these services?
services.cta_body: Register your interest and AfricanSTN will be in touch within two business days to discuss what is right for your organisation.

ecosystem.hero_subheading: AfricanSTN is building a comprehensive map of sports technology activity across Africa. Register to receive our newsletter and sector intelligence reports as the platform develops.
ecosystem.directory_heading: Building the African sports tech directory
ecosystem.directory_lead: AfricanSTN is developing a living directory of sports technology companies operating across Africa - startups, established businesses, and everything in between. The directory covers all four technology domains and tracks company activity, funding, and market presence.
ecosystem.card1_body: If your company operates in African sports technology - whether you are based in Africa or entering the market - register your interest. Directory inclusion is curated by AfricanSTN.
ecosystem.card2_body: Registered members receive AfricanSTN's newsletter and sector intelligence reports covering market developments, funding, and sector trends across Africa.
ecosystem.card3_body: The directory covers all four technology domains: ICT, medical and health tech, advanced materials, and sensors and devices - across the full sports tech vertical.
ecosystem.market_para1: South Africa is the most developed sports technology market on the African continent. It combines strong commercial sports infrastructure, an active technology startup ecosystem, and a relatively advanced data protection environment, including POPIA.
ecosystem.market_para2: For international companies entering Africa, South Africa provides a practical starting point - both as a market in its own right and as a gateway to broader continental expansion.
ecosystem.market_para3: AfricanSTN is based in South Africa and operates within the POPIA regulatory framework, using this as a foundation for engagement with both local and international stakeholders, while maintaining a continental perspective as the platform grows.
ecosystem.market_card1_body: Strong professional leagues across football, rugby, and cricket, with established commercial structures and growing demand for technology.
ecosystem.market_card2_body: An active startup ecosystem, established tech infrastructure, and increasing investment in sports-adjacent technology.
ecosystem.market_card3_body: POPIA provides a sophisticated data protection framework aligned with global standards, supporting compliance and creating confidence for international companies operating in the market.
ecosystem.domains_lead: The directory and intelligence platform covers the full sports tech sector.
ecosystem.domain1_body: AI, data science, media & broadcast, VR/XR, cloud, streaming, social, cybersecurity, digital twins
ecosystem.domain2_body: Biomechanics, recovery, mHealth, nutrition, diagnostics, strength & conditioning
ecosystem.domain3_body: Fibres, textiles, composites, nano materials, foam & gels
ecosystem.domain4_body: Wearables, IoT, biosensors, video technology, connected fitness, robotics
ecosystem.cta_body: Register to receive AfricanSTN's newsletter and sector intelligence reports. If your company operates in African sports tech, you can also register your interest in directory inclusion - AfricanSTN will be in touch to discuss.

contact.hero_subheading: For service enquiries, partnership discussions, or general questions about the African sports technology ecosystem.
contact.uk_entity_meta: Companies House No. 16850337 · ICO No. C1880558
contact.card1_body: For questions about POPIA compliance or the local representative service.
contact.card2_body: For directory registration or early access to market intelligence.
contact.card3_body: For partnership discussions or commercial arrangements - use the registration form and note your interest.

join.hero_heading: Be part of Africa's sports tech ecosystem from the very beginning
join.hero_subheading: AfricanSTN is in its early stages. Register now to become a founding community member - the first group we reach out to as the platform develops.
join.community_heading: There is no cost, no commitment, and no immediate expectation
join.community_para1: AfricanSTN is building the foundations for a network that brings together founders, sport organisations, investors, operators, and partners across Africa and global markets.
join.community_para2: By joining now, you become part of the early supporter community - the first group we reach out to as the African Sports Technology Network develops.
join.benefit1: Occasional updates as the initiative evolves
join.benefit2: Early access to insights, research, and ecosystem mapping
join.benefit3: Invitations to help shape the platform
join.thoughtful_note: AfricanSTN is building thoughtfully and progressively. We would love you to be part of the journey from the start.
join.for_whom_heading: The platform is open to all parts of the sports tech ecosystem
join.audience1_body: Sports tech companies from outside Africa looking to enter, distribute, or maintain compliance in South Africa. AfricanSTN provides POPIA representation and market entry support.
join.audience2_body: African-founded sports tech startups and established businesses seeking visibility, partnerships, and connections within the ecosystem. Register interest in directory inclusion - AfricanSTN curates the directory and will be in touch.
join.audience3_body: Federations, leagues, clubs, and sport bodies looking to understand and procure sports technology solutions. AfricanSTN helps you navigate the landscape.
join.form_lead: Complete the form below to register.
join.next1_body: AfricanSTN will acknowledge your registration within two business days and confirm the next step based on your interest.
join.next2_body: For most enquiries, a short call or email exchange to understand your organisation and what would be most useful.
join.next3_body: For services, AfricanSTN will provide a clear proposal. For directory enquiries, AfricanSTN will confirm whether inclusion is appropriate and discuss next steps.

what.hero_sub: Sports technology is the application of technology to enhance, analyse, commercialise, and grow sport - from elite performance analysis to fan engagement platforms to medical diagnostics for athletes.
what.hero_note: A reference for sport organisations, technology companies, investors, and founders exploring the African sports tech landscape.
what.see_structure_btn: See how the sector is structured
what.definition_heading: Sports technology is broad - and growing
what.definition_lead: The term covers any technology applied to sport - whether that improves how athletes train and recover, how fans engage with their sport, how organisations manage their operations, or how the business of sport generates revenue. It spans software, hardware, data, materials science, and health technology.
what.perf_body: Tools that enhance athlete training, recovery, and performance - wearables, biomechanics analysis, nutrition tracking, and injury prevention systems.
what.biz_body: Technology supporting the commercial side of sport - fan engagement platforms, media and broadcasting tools, ticketing, e-sports, fantasy, and venue operations.
what.infra_body: The enabling layer - connectivity, data infrastructure, cloud platforms, and the hardware and sensors that underpin the rest of the sector.
what.structure_heading: How the sports tech market is organised
what.structure_lead: Sports technology applications can be grouped into three market layers. Understanding this helps organisations identify where technology applies to their work - and helps technology companies position their products accurately.
what.elite_title: Professional & Elite Sport — the context for all verticals below
what.elite_body: All applications operate within or in service of the professional and elite sport environment
what.biz_zone_items: Stadium & venue operations|Media & broadcasting|Social media & fan engagement|Prediction markets|eSports & fantasy|Metaverse
what.mass_zone_items: Wearables & sensors|Fitness & wellbeing|Medical & nutrition|Coaching & training|Sports analytics|Apparel & equipment
what.infographic_attr1: AfricanSTN · africanstn.com · Adapted from global sports tech sector frameworks
what.domains_heading: The four domains that underpin sports tech
what.domains_lead: Sports technology is enabled by four underlying technology domains. Understanding this helps buyers and vendors identify where products sit, and helps investors map the sector accurately.
what.ict_chips: Artificial intelligence|Performance data science|AV / VR / XR|Big data analytics|Blockchain|Cloud infrastructure|Digital twins|Video & game development|Media & broadcast|Mobile & immersive|Privacy & cyber security|Social media|Streaming OTT|Natural language processing|Remote 5G & broadband|Fantasy
what.med_chips: Biomechanics|Cognition & psychology|Athlete recovery|mHealth|Nutrition|Strength & conditioning|Medical & diagnostics|Chronic health
what.sens_chips: At-home connected fitness|IoT & sensor technology|Wearables|Bio sensors|Video|Robotics
what.africa_lead: Sports technology activity in Africa is concentrated primarily in South Africa, with growing ecosystems developing across the continent. AfricanSTN focuses on South Africa as its operational base, with a continental perspective as the platform grows.
what.africa_card1_body: The most mature sports tech market on the continent. Strong commercial sport infrastructure across football, rugby, and cricket, a developed regulatory environment including POPIA, and an active technology startup ecosystem make South Africa the natural starting point for any company entering African sport.
what.africa_card2_body: AfricanSTN takes a continental view of the sports tech landscape - tracking activity, companies, and developments across all 54 African countries as the platform develops.
what.africa_card3_body: South Africa's POPIA framework is among the most advanced data protection regimes on the continent, creating both compliance obligations and market confidence for international operators.
what.role_heading: AfricanSTN covers the full sports tech landscape
what.role_body: AfricanSTN operates across the full sports tech sector - performance technology, the business of sport, and the enabling infrastructure layer. The African market requires a broad lens, and the platform reflects that.
what.role_card1_body: Connecting companies from all four technology domains with African market opportunities.
what.role_card2_body: Registered representation for foreign companies handling South African data.
what.role_card3_body: Research and directory covering the full ecosystem - companies, funding, and sector developments across Africa.
what.cta_heading: Explore what is happening in Africa
what.cta_body: AfricanSTN maps the African sports technology ecosystem - companies, markets, funding, and sector intelligence. If your organisation is part of the space, register your interest.
